name: John Gruber
tagline: Apple, design, and the state of tech
description: Exploring John Gruber's definitive writings on Apple, UI design, web standards, and the tech industry through two decades of Daring Fireball.

llmAnalysis.contextPrompt: You are analyzing an article by John Gruber from Daring Fireball. He is the foremost Apple commentator and creator of Markdown. He is known for sharp, opinionated writing on Apple, technology, design, web standards, and media. He values taste, craftsmanship, and getting the details right.

spiciness.contextPrompt: John Gruber is the premier Apple commentator and creator of Markdown. He writes with strong opinions on Apple, design, Google, Microsoft, web standards, and tech journalism. He's known for pointed criticism of bad design, sloppy journalism, and companies that don't respect users.
